_comment: VR comfort-defaults schema for fully-immersive 6DoF experiences. Teleport + snap turn are always the defaults. Smooth options are opt-in.

teleport.note: Always enable and default. Never remove teleport.

smooth.note: Opt-in only. Vignette must activate automatically when smooth is enabled.

seated.note: Every interaction must be reachable from seated position. Test before ship.

ui.note: head_lock MUST be false. World-lock or body-lock only.

performance.note: Drop visual quality before dropping below min_fps. Never compromise the performance floor.
